title: Multi-tenant QA auditing and mobile data collection
summary: A recreated SaaS architecture model based on high-volume quality auditing, cross-platform HTML5 mobile data collection, tenant-aware workflows, and operational reporting.
highlights: HTML5 cross-platform mobile data collection model
Tenant-aware application and audit workflow concepts
Logical reporting layer over transactional data to reduce reporting overhead

title: Message-driven enterprise integration
summary: A mock enterprise integration pattern based on legacy-to-modern system connectivity, message-based architecture, interface contracts, runtime configuration, retry handling, and operational monitoring.
highlights: Message-level configuration propagation so runtime behavior travels with the message
Canonical message structure, routing, replay, and observability model
Legacy, SAP-connected, HL7, and API-based endpoint patterns

title: Replayable vendor API ingestion and reporting layer
summary: A generalized data platform pattern showing efficient vendor API consumption, SharePoint Online caching, multi-tenant integration, and reporting design without sacrificing recovery or auditability.
highlights: Idempotent API consumer that reduces repetitive object pulls and supports replay
Performance-tuned SQL query shapes for reporting and integration workloads
Multi-tenant integration and reporting layer across vendor and operational data

title: Web-based purchasing and accounts payable system
summary: A recreated early-career business systems example showing how operational workflows can be translated into practical internal applications for purchasing, accounts payable, vendor coordination, and fulfillment operations.
highlights: Web-based purchasing and A/P workflow model
Vendor access for purchase order management and delivery coordination
Foundation for later architecture, integration, and operational systems work
